title: Medical Codes for Billing
excerpt: Wondering about any apps or integrations that would work with CPT medical coding and billing? Pull codes? Do reporting? I couldn’t find anything in my research. Thank you!

posts.author: Rach12 (Rachael )
posts.cookedHtml: Wondering about any apps or integrations that would work with CPT medical coding and billing? Pull codes? Do reporting? I couldn’t find anything in my research. Thank you!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Rach12! Is your end goal to essentially pull a unique code/reference for each item in your board? Feel free to elaborate further as I am not overly familiar with CPT medical coding, however engaged in a little research. If this is the case, can I ask if The Item ID Column or the Auto ID App might work for you here?

Screen Shot 2023-02-06 at 12.12.12 pm540×632 77.7 KB

Let me know what you think!

posts.author: Rach12 (Rachael )
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Bianca, no this is something completely different - it is diagnosis codes for medical billing.

posts.author: massonder (DelorSani)
posts.cookedHtml: Medical billing codes can get a bit tricky. But don’t worry, you’re not alone in this. These codes, like ICD-10 for diagnoses and CPT for procedures, are super important for getting everything sorted for insurance claims. It’s like the secret language of healthcare!
